---
toc: true
---


## Openmindedness

Openmindedness is ...

## Chapters in this section

::: {.section-card-grid}

::: {.section-card}
### Chapter 9: Importing Data

blah blah blah

[Open Chapter 9](ch09-github.html){.section-button}
:::

::: {.section-card}
### Chapter 10: And, Or, and In

blah blah blah

[Open Chapter 10](ch10-and-or-in.html){.section-button}
:::

::: {.section-card}
### Chapter 11: dplyr Subsetting

blah blah blah

[Open Chapter 11](ch11-dplyr-subsetting.html){.section-button}
:::


:::

## What to focus on

As you work through openmindedness ...
